scripts.preinstall: sh -c 'rm -f package-lock.json yarn.lock; case "$npm_config_user_agent" in pnpm/*) ;; *) echo "Use pnpm instead" >&2; exit 1 ;; esac'
scripts.build: pnpm run typecheck && pnpm -r --if-present run build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm run typecheck:libs && pnpm -r --filter "./apps/**" --filter "./scripts" --if-present run typecheck
scripts.test:auth-security-regression: pnpm --filter @workspace/admin run test:auth-runtime && pnpm --filter @workspace/api-server exec tsx --test src/__tests__/auth-real-journey-routes.test.ts src/__tests__/invitation-password-mfa-routing.test.ts
